_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Hunter marker bits across new carrier spells. No exclusions required.
_notes.note_shared_trap_bit: All queried traps (Frost/Immolation/Explosive) share the same flags [128,0,0] = 0x00000080 (mask0 bit7). This is the Hunter trap family bit — a single bit addresses all trap types. Freezing Trap (14310) was not queried but almost certainly shares this bit; verify optionally with .spellinfo all 14310.

talent_affixes._todo: Hawk Eye (3r, tier 1) — Increases the range of ranged weapons by 2/4/6 yards. RANGE is a valid spellmod_op but applies to weapon range not a specific spell — likely requires a different approach. Deferring.
Savage Strikes (2r, tier 1) — Increases critical strike chance with melee attacks by 5/10%. Passive melee crit, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Wing Clip (3r, tier 1) — Gives Wing Clip a 4/8/12% chance to root target. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Entrapment (3r, tier 2) — Your Frost Trap and Immolation Trap have a 4/7/10% chance to entrap targets. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Survival Instincts (2r, tier 2) — Reduces the chance you will be hit by a critical strike by 1/2%. Passive mitigation, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Resourcefulness
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[128,0,0]=0x00000080 (mask0 bit7). Shared Hunter trap bit — single flag addresses all trap types. Trap cooldown -2s/rank (COOLDOWN FLAT: -2000ms). NOTE: WotLK Resourcefulness also reduces mana cost of traps — a second entry (COST PCT -X/rank, same flags) can be added if desired.

talent_affixes._todo: Expose Weakness (3r, tier 3) — Your ranged crits trigger Expose Weakness, increasing AP of your and party members' melee attackers. Proc/aura, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Trap Mastery
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[128,0,0]=0x00000080 (mask0 bit7). Same shared trap bit as id=480. Trap duration +10%/rank (DURATION PCT: 10). NOTE: talent also increases trap radius — RADIUS is a valid spellmod_op and can be added as a second entry (RADIUS PCT +10/rank, same flags) if desired.

talent_affixes._todo: Hunter vs. Wild (3r, tier 4) — Increases your AP by 10/20/30% of total Stamina. Stat conversion, not implementable as SpellMod.
Killer Instinct (3r, tier 4) — Increases your crit chance by 1/2/3% when below 20% mana. Conditional passive, not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Counterattack (1r, tier 4) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Noxious Stings (5r, tier 5) — Increases Serpent Sting damage on targets also affected by Wyvern Sting by 7/14/21/28/35%. Conditional (target has aura), not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Point of No Escape (2r, tier 5) — Increases crit chance against targets in Frost Trap, Wing Clipped, or Concussive Shot by 2/4%. Conditional (target debuff), not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Wyvern Sting (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
T.N.T. (3r, tier 6) — Your Explosive Trap and Explosive Shot have a 6/12/18% chance to stun the target. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Lock and Load (3r, tier 6) — When your trap triggers, 33/66/100% chance to get Lock and Load procs. Proc-based, not implementable as SpellMod.
Black Arrow (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Hunting Party (3r, tier 7) — Your periodic damage has a 3/7/10% chance to restore 1% mana to party members. Proc-based mana restore, not implementable as SpellMod.

Sniper Training (3r, tier 8) — When you have not moved for 6 sec, increases damage of Steady Shot, Chimera Shot, and Explosive Shot by 2/4/6%. Conditional (not-moving state), not implementable as flat SpellMod.
Explosive Shot (1r, tier 8) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
